question.label: Support shape
question.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week?
question.description: Lets her define the most useful manager help without assuming the fix.

answer: Clear priority tradeoffs from leadership would help a lot.

assessment.note: Names a specific missing support — clear priority tradeoffs from leadership — which signals absent clarity and support for momentum/growth.

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?

issues: ref_alias q_steadier_finish not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
The next two weeks should focus on stabilizing and reducing reactive work.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.
Clear priority tradeoffs from leadership would help a lot.
